Post.placeholder: What did you and your pet do today?

Comments.sendFailed: Couldn't post your comment. Try again.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.subtitle: We couldn't find anything at this URL.

emptyBookmarked.title: No bookmarks yet
emptyBookmarked.subtitle: Tap the 🔖 icon to save articles you like.

emptyAll.title: Knowledge base coming soon
emptyAll.subtitle: We're adding more articles — try another category for now.

Friends.subtitle: Add friends and follow each other's pets
Friends.qrInstructions: Have them scan with their phone camera, or copy the link and send it.

add.title: Add friend
add.subtitle: Invite from a QR scan
add.notFoundDesc: This invite link may have expired, or they haven't signed in to the app yet.

emptyFriends.title: No friends yet
emptyFriends.subtitle: Use the Search tab to find owners and add each other.

empty.title: No posts yet
empty.subtitle: Share the first post, or wait for friends' public posts.

Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.subtitle: Pet-friendly restaurant map
Restaurant.geoWarning: Couldn't get your location — using Taipei 101 as the default center, so distance sorting may be off. Allow location in your browser and refresh.
Restaurant.locationError: Couldn't get your current location — default coordinates filled in. Please correct them.
Restaurant.beFirstReview: Be the first to write a review!

empty.title: No restaurants yet
empty.subtitle: Add the first pet-friendly spot, or adjust your filters.
empty.favSubtitle: You haven't favorited any restaurants yet.

review.placeholder: Can pets go indoors? How's the service? Good for big dogs?

Auth.subtitle: Track, share, and discover life with your pets

errors.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Allow popups and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.differentCredential: This email is already linked to a different sign-in method.
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain isn't authorized for sign-in.
errors.config: Sign-in is misconfigured. Please try again later.

linkHint.title: Sign in with {email} first
linkHint.body: This email is registered with {existing}. Sign in with {existing} and we'll automatically link {tried} to the same account.

locked.post: Bind an account to post to the feed
locked.reactions: Bind an account to comment and react
locked.friends: Bind an account to add friends and follow each other
locked.family: Bind an account to create or join a family

upgrade.title: Bind an account to keep your data
upgrade.body: Bind with Google or Apple — your current pets and walk history carry over untouched, and community features unlock.
upgrade.conflictBody: This account already exists, so we'll sign you into it. Data created during your guest session can't be merged into the existing account.

errors.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Allow popups and try again.
errors.generic: Couldn't bind your account. Please try again later.

nudge.title: Bind an account so you don't lose your data
nudge.body: Guest data lives only on this device — clearing your browser or switching devices loses it. Bind with Google or Apple to keep it for good.

settings.title: You're using guest mode
settings.body: Bind with Google or Apple to keep your pets and walk history, and unlock posting, friends, family, and leaderboards.

walkGoal.label: Daily walk goal
walkGoal.hint: Will suggest based on breed/age/weight later

Health.title: Health records
Health.needTwoForChart: Need at least 2 weight records to show the chart

ImportWizard.title: Bring your personal data into this family?
ImportWizard.subtitle: Check anything you want to share with family members. You can do this later from Settings → Family.

invite.text: Join my "{name}" family on Mango Pet: {url}

Family.title: Family
Family.personalInfo: You're in personal mode — your pets, walks, reminders, and expenses are visible only to you. Create or join a family to share them, and you can migrate your existing data in too.
Family.inviteHelp: Have family enter these 6 digits to join — all pet records are shared.

regenConfirm.title: Regenerate invite code?
regenConfirm.message: The old code stops working. Members who already joined aren't affected.

leaveConfirm.title: Leave family?
leaveConfirm.message: After leaving "{name}" you'll no longer see this family's pets and records.

createDialog.title: New family
createDialog.instructions: Create a new family and add your people to care for pets together.

joinDialog.title: Join a family
joinDialog.instructions: Enter the 6-digit invite code your family shared.
joinDialog.errInvalidCode: The invite code must be 6 digits
joinDialog.errAlready: You're already a member of this family

JoinFamily.joiningHint: Hang tight, we're adding you in.
JoinFamily.joinedHint: You're in. Redirecting to the home screen in a moment.
JoinFamily.alreadyMemberHint: Nothing to do — go straight to the app.
JoinFamily.invalidCodeHint: "{code}" isn't a valid 6-digit invite code. Double-check with whoever shared the link.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to Mango Pet
Onboarding.subtitle: Take care of your pets with family — or solo for now. You can switch anytime.
Onboarding.createDescription: Start your own family and invite people to share pet care.
Onboarding.joinDescription: Enter the 6-digit invite code your family shared with you.
Onboarding.footerHint: Personal mode supports every feature; you can create or join a family anytime from Settings.

Achievements.guestHint: Community & leaderboard badges need a bound account to unlock. Personal badges — walks, distance, pets — you can start earning right now.
Achievements.emptyHint: No badges yet — take a walk or add a pet and they'll start lighting up one by one!

celebrate.summaryBody: Amazing! Tap below to see every badge you've unlocked.

react-10.title: Crowd Pleaser
react-10.desc: Get 10 reactions on a single post

privacyData.title: Privacy & Data
privacyData.subtitle: Download a full copy of your Mango Pet data as JSON — pets, records, family memberships, and more. Photos are referenced by URL.

engagementPush.title: Engagement notifications
engagementPush.subtitle: Let Mango Pet nudge you at the right moments — each type can be turned off independently.
engagementPush.familyOnlyHint: Join a family to receive family achievement alerts.

evening-walk-reminder.label: Evening walk reminder
evening-walk-reminder.hint: 8 PM, if today's walks are still under 30 minutes.

streak-warning.label: Streak break warning
streak-warning.hint: 10 PM, when you have a 3+ day streak but haven't walked yet today.

rank-overtake.label: Leaderboard overtake
rank-overtake.hint: After the nightly leaderboard refresh, if a family member just passed you.

family-milestone.label: Family member hit today's goal
family-milestone.hint: The moment a family member completes their 30-minute daily goal.

post-comment.label: Comments on your posts
post-comment.hint: Get notified when someone comments on your post.

post-reaction.label: Reactions on your posts
post-reaction.hint: Get notified when someone reacts to your post (batched into one).

achievement.label: Achievement unlocked
achievement.hint: Notify me when I unlock a new badge.

walkAutoPhoto.title: Auto-photo on walks
walkAutoPhoto.body: Prompt to capture + share at walk start & end

leaderboardVisibility.title: Leaderboard visibility
leaderboardVisibility.subtitle: Choose which dog leaderboards your dogs appear on. You can always see your own dogs.

public.label: Public
public.hint: Your dogs show on the all-app and friends boards (default)

friends.label: Friends only
friends.hint: Hidden from the all-app board, still visible to friends

off.label: Off
off.hint: Hidden from both boards — only you can see your dogs

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Actions below cannot be undone. Make sure you understand the consequences first.

DeleteAccount.warning: Permanently delete your account and associated data
DeleteAccount.cannotUndo: This action cannot be undone. Once confirmed, all data disappears immediately and irrecoverably.
DeleteAccount.previewFailed: Could not preview, but deletion can still proceed (the server handles cleanup).
DeleteAccount.personalDataCount: {n} pet(s) and all their walks, reminders, and expenses
DeleteAccount.familyDataCount: {n} pet(s), along with every record anyone added to them
DeleteAccount.cascadeWarning: Walks, reminders, and expenses your family added to these pets will also be deleted — they'll disappear on their side too.
DeleteAccount.socialDataCount: {n} post(s) including reactions; your reactions on others' posts and your restaurant reviews are also cleared.
DeleteAccount.nothingToDelete: Nothing extra to delete — the account itself will still be removed.
DeleteAccount.confirmInputLabel: Type your display name "{name}" to confirm
DeleteAccount.confirmInputHint: Must match exactly to enable the delete button

Leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
Leaderboard.familyOnlyMe: You're the only one in this family — invite someone to make it a contest!
Leaderboard.humanSubtitle: Weighted: distance × size factor + duration + streak

computing.title: Leaderboard is updating
computing.subtitle: Scores aggregate nightly (Asia/Taipei). Go walk a dog to rack up points!

personalEmpty.title: Join a family to see leaderboards
personalEmpty.subtitle: Leaderboards work within families. For just-yourself stats, your home page already covers it.

dog.subtitle: Dogs ranked by a size · age · breed-weighted score — compete with friends or the whole app

emptyFriends.title: No friends' dogs yet
emptyFriends.subtitle: Add friends and their dogs show up here to compete on score.

emptyAll.title: Dog leaderboard is warming up
emptyAll.subtitle: Scores update right after each walk, with a nightly re-aggregation (Asia/Taipei). Go walk a dog to get on the board!

core.needPetDescription: Add a pet before starting a walk.
core.errDenied: Location blocked — allow it in browser settings
core.noPathWarning: No GPS points captured — try manual log
core.emptyWalksDescription: Tap Start walking, or use Manual log to backfill

celebration.goalMissedHint: {min} more min to goal — try again tomorrow 💪
celebration.vsAvgLonger: Longer than weekly avg by {min} min
celebration.vsAvgShorter: Shorter than weekly avg by {min} min

encouragement.lastWalkYesterday: {name}'s last walk was yesterday — time to move

Push.title: Push notifications
Push.iosHint: On iPhone, add the app to your Home Screen first (Safari Share → Add to Home Screen) to receive push.
Push.vapidHint: VAPID key not set. In Firebase Console → Project settings → Cloud Messaging → Web push certificates, generate a key and set it as NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_VAPID_KEY.

status.denied: Blocked — re-enable notifications in your browser settings
status.enabled: Active — you'll get a push when reminders fire

streakWarning.title: Don't break your streak 🔥
streakWarning.body: Walk {petName} now or lose your {streak}-day streak

rankOvertake.title: You've been passed
rankOvertake.body: {overtakerName} just passed you on the leaderboard — keep going 💪
